name: Iso11783OPLoadAuxAssignment
title: Iso11783OPLoadAuxAssignment
syntax: long Iso11783OPLoadAuxAssignment( dword ecuHandle, char filename[] );
description: This function loads the "Preferred Auxiliary Input Assignment" from an ini file. If the ECU is active the "Preferred Assignment Message" is sent immediately. Otherwise it is sent if the ECU gets active.
The "Preferred Assignment" must be saved with Iso11783OPSaveAuxAssignment before.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU. The handle must be created with Iso11783CreateECU.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: File name of an INI file

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
